creator: emiliano.russo@ingv.it
text:
it would be cool IMHO if the option to compile hdf5 with parallel I/O would be easily available (ie. a checkbox in the usual dialog box), i think this is a feature that most hdf5 users would find useful. :-)

note: building hdf5 with parallel i/o support just depends on the availability of an mpicc binary, which usually comes either with mpich or openmpi mpi implementations.
